questions: dissertation ar thesis er difference ki?
answers: A dissertation is an extensive research document required for a doctoral degree (PhD). It presents original contribution to knowledge in a field and can take several years to complete.
Dissertation holo PhD er jonno ekta boro research project. Eta thesis er theke boro ar more original — notun knowledge create korte hoy. Usually 200-300+ pages hoy.
Writing a dissertation involves choosing a research topic, forming a committee, passing qualifying exams, writing a proposal, conducting research, and defending your findings before your committee.
A dissertation defense is the final oral examination where you present and defend your research. Prepare by practicing your presentation, anticipating questions, and knowing your work inside and out.
